## beehiiv webhooks get

Show a webhook by endpoint ID

### Synopsis

Get webhook

Retrieve a specific webhook belonging to a publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/webhooks/{endpointId}

```
beehiiv webhooks get <endpointId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv webhooks get endpoint_123
beehiiv webhooks show endpoint_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for get
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
